General.Name: Landsea Green Group Co Ltd
General.Description: Landsea Green Management Limited, an investment holding company, develops, manages, and sells properties in Mainland China and the United States. It operates through Property Development and Sales in US, Property Development and Sales in Mainland China, Management Services, and Office Property Investment segments. The company was formerly known as Landsea Green Properties Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Landsea Green Management Limited in August 2022. The company was incorporated in 1990 and is headquartered in Wan Chai, Hong Kong.
General.Address: 8 Queen's Road East, Wan Chai, Hong Kong
